payload.gap_note: HONEST GAP, found verifying this event: field-research's own works/ directory, as fetched for this scribe run (full history, all branches and open-PR refs), does NOT contain works/2026-07-20-coverage-not-custody at all — field-sync.mjs's own documented contract ('works that vanish upstream are removed from the mirror') means this datavism-side copy would be pruned on the pipeline's next run if that absence holds. This scribe cannot determine whether the work was retracted after the 07:43:56Z sync ran, moved, or sits on a ref this session could not reach; recorded as an open discrepancy between the two archives' current public states, not resolved here.
